title: anthoxanthum novae-zelandiae
intro: Anthoxanthum novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand sweet grass or sweet grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum novae-zelandiae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Anthoxanthum novae-zelandiae can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
